title: mirabilis nyctaginea
intro: Mirabilis nyctaginea, also known as the moonflower or four o'clock, is a flowering plant species in the family Nyctaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mirabilis nyctaginea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
